title: Drone Works
description: Automated agricultural drones capable of harvesting your crops and storing resources
body:
![Logo Drone Works By Xen0r-star](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f45137a9c64a77967fbfd2b29ea5471bc561faea.png)

--- ### About **Drone Works** is a Minecraft Fabric 1.21.8 mod that adds **smart agricultural drones** to automate your farming. Farming is relaxing... but repetitive. With **Drone Works**, you can craft drones that automatically harvest your **carrots, wheat, potatoes, and beets**, letting you focus on building, exploring, or trading instead. Simply craft a drone using the **Box Block**, link it to a **Station**, and it will harvest crops within a **10-block radius**, automatically depositing everything into the station’s inventory. Stations are fully **Hopper-compatible**, allowing complete automation. Sit back, relax, and let your drones handle the hard work . ✨ --- ### Features **Smart Farming** - Automatically harvests mature carrots, wheat, potatoes, and beets - Works in a 10-block radius around the station **Customizable Drones** - Choose from 16 colors using **Paint Bombs** - Crafted easily in the **Box Block** **Station System** - Stores all harvested crops - Fully **Hopper-compatible** **Lightweight & Easy** - Simple to set up - Optimized and fits perfectly into any automated base --- ### Compatibility | Minecraft | Loader | Status | Notes | |------------|---------|---------|--------| | 1.21.8 | Fabric | ✅ Supported | Recommended version | | 1.21.x | Fabric | ⚠️ Planned | Use Minecraft 1.21.8 or higher | | < 1.21 | — | ❌ Not supported | Use Minecraft 1.21.8 or higher | --- ### Screenshots / Media 📸 *Coming soon* --- ### Credits & License 👤 Developed by **Xen0r-star** 📄 License: MIT
